heading: Payment for wagon transportation
label: 101 Payment for wagon transportation
text: All wagon transportation from the point where delivery is made by the last common carrier to the agency, school, or elsewhere, and between points on the reservation or elsewhere, shall be paid from the funds appropriated or otherwise available for the support of the school, agency, or other project for which the supplies to be transported are purchased.
notes: Transfer of FunctionsEffective , Procurement Division of Department of the Treasury changed to Bureau of Federal Supply by regulation issued by Secretary of the Treasury under authority of , Government Organization and Employees. Functions of Bureau of Federal Supply transferred to Administrator of General Services by section 102 of , , which was repealed and reenacted as , Public Buildings, Property, and Works, by , §§ 1, 6(b), , , 1304. was amended generally by , , , and, as so amended, no longer relates to the Bureau of Federal Supply.
